code-runner.executorMap.c: cd $dir && powershell -Command "if (Select-String -Path '$fileName' -Pattern '#include <graphics.h>' -Quiet) { g++ '$fileName' -o '$fileNameWithoutExt.exe' -lbgi -lgdi32 -lcomdlg32 -luuid -loleaut32 -lole32; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & '.\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe' } } else { gcc '$fileName' -o '$fileNameWithoutExt.exe'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & '.\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe' } }"
